# Add source-content validation gate for downloaded public files

Epic: `TRACK_DATA_QUALITY_EVIDENCE` — Data quality, source validation and evidence readiness

Labels: type:roadmap-function, priority:must, interface:data_pipeline

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`. Refine the acceptance criteria
before opening it in GitHub.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] A source-content validation command and summary outputs exist for downloaded public files.
- [ ] Licence and data-governance implications are checked.
- [ ] Tests cover missing, skipped, pass and fail validation states.
- [ ] Documentation or Conductor context records the raw-cache boundary and derived-only outputs.
